root.sql: select sc_mem_m_tran_group.entry_date , sc_mem_m_tran_group.membership_no , sc_mem_m_tran_group.remark , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_tran_group.membership_no)as memname , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem(sc_mem_m_tran_group.membership_no)as groupname , (CASE sc_mem_m_tran_group.bank_status WHEN '1' THEN 'หักบัญชี' ELSE null END)as account , (CASE sc_mem_m_tran_group.resign_status WHEN '1' THEN 'ลาออก' ELSE null END)as resign , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.retire_id , fpa_get_crem_memno(sc_mem_m_tran_group.membership_no)as crem_memno , fpa_get_crem_groupno(sc_mem_m_tran_group.membership_no)as crem_groupno from sc_mem_m_tran_group , sc_mem_m_membership_registered where sc_mem_m_tran_group.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no --and sc_mem_m_tran_group.entry_date = '10/05/2023' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_tran_group.entry_date , sc_mem_m_tran_group.membership_no
